basic_details.job_title: Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Notification 2026 has been released on 8 July 2026 on the official website of Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara. A total of 1 Administrator cum Educationist vacancy has been announced through the Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Education, School Administration or related field, Minimum 15-20 years experience in education sector with at least 5 years in school leadership role
qualification.details: Preferably a postgraduate degree in Education, School Administration, or a related field with minimum 15 to 20 years experience in the education sector including at least 5 years in a school leadership, administration or management role. | link description: Link | official notification pdf: Click here | official website: Click here

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Preferably a postgraduate degree in Education, School Administration, or a related field with minimum 15 to 20 years experience in the education sector including at least 5 years in a school leadership, administration or management role.

content_sections.heading: Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Vidyut Board Vidyalaya Vadodara Administrator cum Educationist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Administrator cum Educationist post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 22nd July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Administrator cum Educationist position?
faq.answer: The preferred qualification is a postgraduate degree in Education, School Administration, or a related field, along with 15-20 years of experience in the education sector, including at least 5 years in a leadership role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Administrator cum Educationist post is 60 years.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Administrator cum Educationist.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Vidyut Board Vidyalaya located?
faq.answer: The Vidyut Board Vidyalaya is located in Vadodara, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Administrator cum Educationist post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q10. When does the application process start?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 8th July 2026.
